_comment: login fields confirmed against real page HTML from a failed-run debug screenshot (the form is Material-UI: 'Email address'/'Password' are floating <label>s, not native placeholders, so they're matched by label text via get_by_label, not a placeholder CSS selector). The list_* fields are still best-effort from screenshots only, not real page source - may need adjusting after the next test run. There is a recaptcha-container on the login page; if login starts failing again after this fix, that's the next suspect (Google sometimes challenges datacenter/automated traffic).
